hooks.command: VAULT=$(cat ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/.vault-path 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$VAULT" ] && echo '=== Recent plugin activity ===' && tail -n 60 "$VAULT/.wiki/log.md" 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.prompt:
A file was just written. Get its path from the hook context (tool_input.file_path). If the path does not contain '/Research/', stop immediately and do nothing.

If it is a Research/ file:
1. Run: commonplace impact --vault "$(commonplace vault-path)" --source "<file_path>"
2. If the affected array is empty, stop. Otherwise, for each affected note (up to 5): read the new source and affected note, determine if the new source contradicts/extends/supersedes claims. For soft impact, append a See also link to Connections. For hard impact, add an [!update] callout to Notes.

A file was just written. Get its path from the hook context (tool_input.file_path). If the path does not contain '/Research/', stop immediately and do nothing.

If it is a Research/ file:
1. Run: commonplace cross-domain --vault "$(commonplace vault-path)" --source "<file_path>"
2. If the results array is empty, stop immediately and do nothing.
3. For each cross-domain bridge concept: read the new source and affected notes from other domains. Add cross-reference callouts in the Notes section of affected notes linking back to the new source.
